questions: wifi speed kom but cable e thik
raat e speed kom hoy keno?
why is my internet so slow?
answers: Internet slow hoyar onek karon thakte pare — peak hour usage, router er distance, ba temporary network congestion. Ekbar router restart kore dekhen, onek somoy ei simple step e fix hoye jay!
Speed test korte speedtest.net ba fast.com e jan. Test er somoy wifi bade LAN cable diye connect korun accurate result er jonno. ISP Digital er minimum guaranteed speed holo apnar plan er 80%.
YouTube buffering hole prothome video quality ta 720p ba 480p e set korun. Tarpor router restart korun. Jodi tarpor o hoy, amader technical team ke janaben, amra line check korbo.
High ping gaming er jonno problem — amra bujhte parchi! Router e QoS (Quality of Service) enable korun ar gaming device ke priority den. ISP Digital er gaming plan e low ping guaranteed thake.
Apnar speed promised moto na paile amader 09612-000000 number e call korun. Amader technician line test kore exact problem identify kore fix korbe. ISP Digital speed guarantee dey!
Raat e speed kom lagte pare karon takhon maximum users online thake (peak hours 8pm-12am). Jodi regularly slow hoy, plan upgrade consider korun ba amader ke janaben, amra optimize korbo.
WiFi te speed kom but cable e thik mane router e problem thakte pare. Router er position change korun — open space e, moddhe moddhe rakhun. Wall ar furniture signal block kore.

Internet speed improve korar tips: 1) Router restart korun regularly, 2) 5GHz WiFi band use korun, 3) Unnecessary background downloads bondho korun, 4) Router er firmware update korun. ISP Digital always best speed dite committed!
Apnar download speed check korechhen ki? speedtest.net e giye test korun ar result ta amader share korun. Amra ISP Digital theke immediately investigate korbo ar solution dibo.
Bandwidth problem hole check korun onno kono device heavy download korche kina. Multiple device e HD streaming korle speed bhag hoye jay. ISP Digital er higher plan e more bandwidth paben.
